india_trends.title: Wall Street regulators jointly propose to trim Biden-era private fund reporting rules
india_trends.summary: U.S. securities regulators proposed reforms to private fund disclosure rules, aiming to reduce burdens on smaller firms while still collecting essential data. The changes would significantly raise asset thresholds for mandatory reporting, a move criticized by some for potentially increasing industry

india_trends.title: 'Grid bottlenecks, execution risks slow power expansion': Report
india_trends.summary: India's renewable energy goals are facing hurdles. Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd, or PGCIL, is struggling with delays in building power transmission lines. These delays are caused by land acquisition and other issues. This is affecting PGCIL's profits and its stock market performance. The comp

india_trends.title: SFIO widens probe into IndusInd Bank; summons audit firms over ₹2,000 crore derivatives irregularities
india_trends.summary: The Serious Fraud Investigation Office is investigating IndusInd Bank's derivatives portfolio. Major audit firms associated with the bank over the last decade have been summoned. This probe follows questioning of former bank officials. The irregularities are estimated to have caused losses of around

india_trends.title: CERC proposes Grid India as market coupling operator
india_trends.summary: In a bid to revolutionize electricity trading in India, the National Electricity Regulatory Authority is unveiling proposed regulations that will allow the Grid Controller of India Ltd to implement market coupling. This strategic initiative aims to standardize pricing across various electricity mark

india_trends.title: Drug regulator transfers 95 officials in mass reshuffle
india_trends.summary: The Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation has moved about 95 officials across India. This reshuffle aims to improve compliance and lessen the impact of long-serving officers on the pharmaceutical sector. The move follows a structured transfer policy.

india_trends.title: UAE hotels find peace in war, go for renovations and upgrades
india_trends.summary: Premium hotels in Dubai are undertaking renovations. This is happening due to a slowdown in tourist numbers. Some hotels will close for up to 18 months. Others are pausing restaurant operations. Industry experts expect more luxury properties to follow. This strategy aims to minimize revenue disrupti

india_trends.title: Telcos test waters with smaller tariff hikes before big one
india_trends.summary: Bharti Airtel, Vodafone Idea and Reliance Jio are changing their prepaid plans. Airtel has increased prices and added streaming subscriptions. Vodafone Idea is restructuring plans, especially for 5G. Jio reduced validity on a basic plan but also added OTT benefits. These moves aim to boost revenue w

india_trends.title: India's premium liquor boom defies global slowdown
india_trends.summary: India's demand for premium liquor is surging. This trend defies global patterns where consumers are buying less expensive options. Despite a worldwide decline in alcohol sales volume and value, India saw growth. This indicates a strong consumer preference for prestige whiskies and premium white spir

india_trends.title: Fermi stock drops sharply after CEO and CFO departures
india_trends.summary: U.S. power startup Fermi's shares plummeted 23% after CEO Toby Neugebauer and CFO Miles Everson abruptly departed. Short seller Fuzzy Panda Research alleged fraudulent transfers by Neugebauer and other executives. Despite leadership changes, the company reiterated its operational plan for "Project M

india_trends.title: Global strategic oil inventory totaled 2.5 billion barrels at end of 2025, EIA says
india_trends.summary: Global strategic oil reserves reached 2.5 billion barrels by year-end. China, the United States, and Japan hold the largest stockpiles. The US is releasing oil to lower prices. Other nations also maintain significant reserves. China notably increased its reserves in recent years.

india_trends.title: Bain Capital sole contender for Vitabiotics buy
india_trends.summary: TPG, EQT chose to opt out from final bids. UK’s largest nutraceutical company with operations in India, UK, China exports to 100 countries. Company was originally valued at £900 mn.

india_trends.title: Nasdaq set to snap 13-day winning streak as oil rebounds, US-Iran tensions resurface
india_trends.summary: US tech stocks declined on 20 April amid renewed tensions between the US and Iran, leading to a rebound in crude oil prices. The Nasdaq 100 faced a potential end to its 13-day winning streak, while other indices also saw losses as peace talks remained uncertain.

india_trends.summary: Kevin Warsh, Donald Trump's nominee for Federal Reserve Chair, will assure lawmakers of his commitment to monetary policy independence. He also plans to address non-monetary Fed functions and push for reforms, arguing the institution must "stay in its lane" and prioritize price stability to maintain

india_trends.title: RBI plans to remain nimble to prevent persistent supply shock amid West Asia crisis
india_trends.summary: Reserve Bank of India Governor Sanjay Malhotra addressed global challenges at Princeton University, stressing upon agile monetary policy to counter supply shocks from West Asia. The focus is on preventing inflation from becoming persistent. Prudent fiscal management and domestic production also play

india_trends.title: Deal activity value jumps 18 pc to USD 123.8 bn in 2025; volumes drop marginally
india_trends.summary: India's deal activity saw a significant rise in 2025. Deal values increased by 18 percent to USD 123.8 billion. This growth occurred even as the number of transactions decreased. Investors focused on larger, strategic deals in infrastructure and financial services. Cross-border deals also saw a subs

india_trends.title: Suzlon enters into initial pact with Korean firm GS E&C for RE biz in India
india_trends.summary: Suzlon Energy and Korean firm GS E&C have signed an initial pact to partner in India's renewable energy sector, focusing on project development and solution optimization. Additionally, GS E&C will cooperate with Arie Energy LLP on wind farm repowering projects. AFINIT and Yes Bank also inked
